title: Role Permission Audit + Owner-Scoped Data Access

tasks.title: Create audit script — programmatic scan of role x permission matrix
tasks.description: One-off TS script importing RoleEnum/PermissionEnum/ROLE_PERMISSIONS from packages/seed/src/required/rolePermissions.seed.ts; emit per-role table of every _VIEW_ALL/_READ_ALL/_VIEW_PRIVATE grant (role | permission | category) as the 'read' audit baseline. File: packages/seed/scripts/audit-role-permissions.ts. DONE: executed, seed matches spec §3 exactly (no discrepancy); only live cross-tenant READ leak = accommodation (HOST holds VIEW_ALL).

subtasks.title: Import role-permissions map from seed file
Run and capture output as the read audit baseline

tasks.title: Create audit script — enumerate admin list/getById endpoints + write-enforcement matrix
tasks.description: Walk apps/api/src/routes/*/admin/ to record entity | route | method | requiredPermissions | optional-owner-filter? Walk packages/service-core/src/services/*/ permission files to classify each write/destructive op as isOwner / permission-only / staff-only / NA — INCLUDING UI-less routes (/{id}/hard, batch, restore). DONE (static analysis — worktree node_modules incomplete, tsx/vitest missing): accommodation is the ONLY non-staff-exploitable leak (list+getById). NO write-leaks for any _OWN role; accommodation matches §2.2. conversations/admin/list.ts already implements the §5.2 forced-scope pattern = reference impl. Selectors needing /options: users, destinations, accommodations, events. 5 open questions logged for owner.

subtasks.title: Enumerate admin list routes and requiredPermissions
Flag routes with optional ownerId-style query param
Enumerate write ops + their check function per owner-scoped entity
Classify each write op: isOwner / permission-only / no check
Emit endpoint table + write-enforcement matrix for owner review

tasks.title: ⛔ OWNER-REVIEW GATE (§12) — present audit outputs, receive explicit approval on ALL verdicts
tasks.description: HARD GATE. Human-in-the-loop. CLOSED 2026-05-29. All §12 decisions approved by owner — recorded in .claude/specs/SPEC-169-role-permission-own-scoping/decision-log.md. Key verdicts: D1 VIEW_OWN only accommodation; D2 404 NOT_FOUND for non-owned; D3 resolver accommodation-only; D4 /options for 6 entities (users/destinations/accommodations/events/event-organizers/event-locations, ACCESS_PANEL_ADMIN, accommodation payload +type+destination); D5 beforeLoad only on /accommodations list; D6 seed wording; D7 posts = document only (Option C), NOT touched. CLIENT_MANAGER untouched. Posts granular model deferred to new SPEC-170.

subtasks.title: Present T-001 role×permission matrix to owner
Present T-002 endpoint + write-enforcement matrix to owner
⛔ §12: approve which entities get _VIEW_OWN + exact permission names
⛔ §12: approve ownership resolver shape (§5.6) + which entities get a descriptor
⛔ §12: approve /options payload shape, gating, and which entities get one
⛔ §12: approve seed wording (HOST grant removal, EDITOR rationale comment)
⛔ §12: approve which admin routes get beforeLoad guard + redirect targets
Record all approvals in a decision log file

tasks.title: Add ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_OWN (and approved _VIEW_OWN perms) to PermissionEnum
tasks.description: DONE. Added ACCOMMODATION_VIEW_OWN = 'accommodation.viewOwn' to permission.enum.ts right after VIEW_ALL (D1: accommodation only). PermissionEnumSchema is z.nativeEnum so the value is picked up automatically — no manual list. Extended test/enums/enum.schemas.test.ts (value in validPermissions + 2 dedicated SPEC-169 assertions). Tests 24/24 pass; @repo/schemas typecheck clean.

subtasks.title: ⛔ §12: confirm exact permission names from T-003 before adding

tasks.title: Define per-entity ownership resolver (ownerColumn + isOwner)
tasks.description: DONE. Created packages/service-core/src/utils/ownership.ts: OwnershipDescriptor { ownerColumn, isOwner } + ownedByColumn() helper + OWNERSHIP_REGISTRY (D3: accommodation only → ownerColumn 'ownerId') + getOwnershipDescriptor(). Re-exported from utils/index.ts. Test test/utils/ownership.test.ts 6/6 pass. @repo/service-core typecheck clean (after building @repo/billing dist to clear a preexisting worktree baseline-red unrelated to this change). §12 column-name checkpoint satisfied by D3 (accommodation=ownerId, confirmed by audit).

subtasks.title: ⛔ §12: confirm ownership column names per entity from T-003 (authorId? createdById? ownerId?)

tasks.title: Implement checkCanAdminView (VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN+isOwner) in accommodation.permissions
tasks.description: DONE. Added checkCanAdminView in accommodation.permissions.ts (PURE fn). VIEW_ALL → any; VIEW_OWN → getOwnershipDescriptor('accommodation').isOwner else NOT_FOUND (D2, no existence leak); neither → FORBIDDEN. Does NOT reuse checkCanView (which allows any PUBLIC). Uses the T-005 resolver so isOwner stays single-sourced (§5.6). Tests: 5 cases in accommodation.permissions.test.ts (AC-4 VIEW_ALL any, AC-8 own, AC-9 other PUBLIC+PRIVATE → NOT_FOUND, neither → FORBIDDEN) — 34/34 file pass; typecheck clean. SERVICE method + getById route wiring deferred to T-009 (§12 approach checkpoint).

subtasks.title: ⛔ §12: confirm error code (FORBIDDEN vs NOT_FOUND) from T-003

tasks.title: Implement forced owner-scoping in adminList for accommodation (VIEW_OWN path)
tasks.description: DONE. checkCanAdminList now accepts VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN (new error msg). _executeAdminSearch override in AccommodationService FORCES entityFilters.ownerId = actor.id for a VIEW_OWN-only actor (overwrites any client/forged ownerId); VIEW_ALL lists unscoped; neither → FORBIDDEN (checkCanAdminList). No hookState stash needed — actor is available in _executeAdminSearch params. Tests: admin-search.test.ts +4 forced-scope cases (AC-1/AC-2 forced, AC-4 unscoped + staff explicit filter), adminListPermission +VIEW_OWN-allowed + updated msg, permissions.test +VIEW_OWN-allowed + updated msg. Full accommodation folder 312/312 pass; typecheck clean.

subtasks.title: Update checkCanAdminList to accept VIEW_ALL OR VIEW_OWN
In _canAdminList detect held permission and stash on context
In _executeAdminSearch force ownerId = actor.id for VIEW_OWN-only
Confirm neither-perm path still throws FORBIDDEN
